message:
feat(cli): add antipatterns command for mining and managing anti-patterns

Adds CLI commands for anti-pattern mining operations:
- `ms antipatterns mine <sessions>` - Mine anti-patterns from CASS sessions
- `ms antipatterns show <id>` - Show anti-pattern details
- `ms antipatterns list` - List all mined anti-patterns
- `ms antipatterns link` - Link anti-pattern to positive pattern

The CLI integrates with the antipatterns module to detect rollbacks,
corrections, and failure signals from sessions and synthesize them
into actionable "avoid when" rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
